meanings.definition: bring in a new person or object into a familiar environment
examples: He brought in a new judge
The new secretary introduced a nasty rumor

meanings.definition: earn on some commercial or business transaction; earn as salary or wages
examples: How much do you make a month in your new job?
She earns a lot in her new job
this merger brought in lots of money

meanings.definition: be sold for a certain price
examples: The old print fetched a high price at the auction
The microphone brought in the sounds from the room next to mine
